images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a sleek glowing automated server pipeline in a data center, tethered by a taut cable to a heavy dark iron weight it drags behind — the hidden carrying cost of automation. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
